untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-level bid/ask data and alternating bid/ask jump detection. Available indicators lack explicit bid/ask prices, tick sequence tracking, and spread measurement. The core logic (detecting reversals between bid and ask prices, measuring spread widening) cannot be accurately represented using OHLCV-based indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using small body_pct (small candles suggesting bid/ask oscillation) and close reversals (prev_close comparison) to simulate mean reversion behavior. However, this is a crude proxy: the original signal requires market microstructure data (bid/ask queue imbalances, order flow direction) not available in standard candlestick indicators. A proper implementation would need tick data access and bid/ask level APIs.
